---
title: "02: Demographic and Data Preparation"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Load Libraries and Data

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(gtsummary)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

#Configuration
data_path <- "Z:/Kucirek/"

#load
result_wide <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "result_wide.rds"))
setDT(result_wide)

#check that required PHQ columns from 01 exist
required_cols <- c("phq_score", "phq_type_used", "phq_severity", "phq_clinical", "phq_subclinical")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(result_wide))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Error: The following required PHQ columns are missing from result_wide.rds:", 
             paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), 
             "\nPlease re-run '01_joining_and_cohort_definition.Rmd' to regenerate the data files."))
}
```

### Create `result_info`

```{r}
#make result_info by merging result_wide with demo_data 
result_info <- unique(result_wide[, .(mrn_deid, age_at_encounter, fin_class, race, ethnic, sex)], by = "mrn_deid")

#standardize fin_class categories 
result_info[, fin_class := str_to_title(fin_class)]
result_info[fin_class == "Comercial", fin_class := "Commercial"]

# combine Blue Cross/Blue Shield with Private Payors
result_info[fin_class %in% c("Blue Cross/Blue Shield", "Private Payors"), fin_class := "Private Payors"]

# put small insurance classes into 'other'
result_info[, fin_class := fcase(
  fin_class %in% c("Ppo", "Hmo/Pos", "Miscellaneous", "Commercial", "", "Grants & Funds"), "Other",
  default = fin_class
)]

result_info[, ethnic_refined := fcase(
  ethnic %in% c("Mexican, Mexican American, or Chicano/a", "Hispanic or Latino", "Puerto Rican", "Cuban", "Other Hispanic, Latino/a, or Spanish origin"), "Hispanic / Latino",
  ethnic == "Not Hispanic, Latino/a, or Spanish origin", "Not Hispanic / Latino",
  ethnic == "Patient declines to respond", "NA",
  ethnic == "Unknown or Patient unable to respond", "Other",
  default = "Other"
)]

result_info[, race_refined := fcase(
  race %in% c("Asian Indian", "Asian/Mideast Indian", 
              "Chinese", "Japanese", "Korean", "Filipino", "Vietnamese"), "Asian",
  race %in% c("Native Hawaiian", "Native Hawaiian/Other Pacific Islander", 
              "Other Pacific Islander", "Guamanian or Chamorro", "Samoan",
              "American Indian or Alaska Native", "None of the above", "Other"), "Other",
  race == "White", "White",
  race == "Black or African-American", "Black or African American",
  race == "More than one Race", "More than one Race",
  race %in% c("Patient declines to respond", "Unknown or Patient unable to respond"), "Declined/NA",
  default = "Other"
)]

# Combined race/ethnicity per manuscript Table 1 categories:
# Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Asian, Hispanic, Other, Declined/NA
# Combined race/ethnicity per manuscript Table 1 categories:
# Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Asian, Hispanic, Other, Declined/NA
hispanic_values <- c("Hispanic or Latino",
                     "Mexican, Mexican American, or Chicano/a",
                     "Puerto Rican", "Cuban",
                     "Other Hispanic, Latino/a, or Spanish origin")

result_info[, race_ethnicity_combined := fcase(
  # Hispanic takes precedence over race
  ethnic %in% hispanic_values, "Hispanic",
  
  # Then non-Hispanic categories by race
  race == "White", "Non-Hispanic White",
  race == "Black or African-American", "Non-Hispanic Black",
  
  # Asian (combines East and South Asian per manuscript Table 1)
  race %in% c("Asian Indian", "Asian/Mideast Indian", "Chinese", "Japanese",
              "Korean", "Filipino", "Vietnamese"), "Asian",
  
  # Declined/NA — keep separate from Other
  race %in% c("Unknown or Patient unable to respond",
              "Patient declines to respond"), "Declined/NA",
  
  # Everything else (Pacific Islander, AI/AN, More than one Race, Other)
  default = "Other"
)]

result_info[, race_ethnicity_combined := factor(race_ethnicity_combined,
  levels = c("Non-Hispanic White", "Non-Hispanic Black", "Asian",
             "Hispanic", "Other", "Declined/NA"))]
```

### Prepare Data for Propensity Score Matching

```{r}
# load required data files
chronic_derm_cohort <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "chronic_derm_cohort.rds"))
chronic_derm_phq_summary <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "chronic_derm_phq_summary.rds"))
setDT(chronic_derm_cohort)
setDT(chronic_derm_phq_summary)

# define chronic derm patients 
chronic_derm_mrns <- unique(chronic_derm_cohort$mrn_deid)

# Safety check
if (length(chronic_derm_mrns) == 0) {
  warning("No chronic derm patients found in loaded cohort - check File 01 processing!")
}

# Create final consistent dataset: chronic derm patients (already have PHQ data by inclusion criteria) WITH complete demographic data
chronic_derm_with_phq <- chronic_derm_mrns  # All chronic derm patients now have PHQ data by design
cat("Chronic derm patients with PHQ data:", length(chronic_derm_with_phq), "(100% by File 01 inclusion criteria)\n")

patient_data_for_matching <- result_info[, .(mrn_deid, age_at_encounter, sex, race_refined, ethnic_refined, race_ethnicity_combined, fin_class)]
patient_data_for_matching[, is_chronic_derm := mrn_deid %in% chronic_derm_with_phq]

# prepare covariates
patient_data_for_matching[, sex := factor(sex)]
patient_data_for_matching[, race_refined := factor(race_refined)]
patient_data_for_matching[, ethnic_refined := factor(ethnic_refined)]
patient_data_for_matching[, fin_class := factor(fin_class)]
# race_ethnicity_combined already factored in result_info, but ensure consistency
patient_data_for_matching[, race_ethnicity_combined := factor(race_ethnicity_combined,
  levels = c("Non-Hispanic White", "Non-Hispanic Black", "Asian",
             "Hispanic", "Other", "Declined/NA"))]

# calculate approximate number of visits
patient_visits <- result_wide[, .N, by = mrn_deid]
setnames(patient_visits, "N", "num_visits")

# id preexisting psych care
psych_patterns <- c("BEHAVIORAL", "COLLABORATIVE", "PSYCH", "KOVLER", "MENTAL HEALTH", "COUNSELING") # Added broader terms
psych_regex <- paste(psych_patterns, collapse = "|")

# id all psych encounters and their dates
all_psych_encounters <- result_wide[str_detect(toupper(appt_dept), psych_regex)]

# get first psych visit date per patient
first_psych_dates <- all_psych_encounters[, .(first_psych_visit = min(enc_date, na.rm = TRUE)), by = "mrn_deid"]

# get first chronic derm visit date per patient
first_derm_dates <- chronic_derm_cohort[, .(first_chronic_derm_visit = min(enc_date, na.rm = TRUE)), by = "mrn_deid"]

# merge psych and derm first visit dates
patient_first_visits <- merge(first_psych_dates, first_derm_dates, by = "mrn_deid", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE)

# define has_psych_condition based on timing
# For chronic derm patients: needs behavioral care visit before chronic derm diagnosis
# For control patients: any psychiatric visit counts (no chronic derm timing constraint)
patient_first_visits[, has_psych_condition_timed := ifelse(
  !is.na(first_chronic_derm_visit), 
  # Chronic derm patients: psych visit must be before derm visit
  !is.na(first_psych_visit) & (first_psych_visit < first_chronic_derm_visit),
  # Control patients: any psych visit counts
  !is.na(first_psych_visit)
)]
patient_first_visits[is.na(has_psych_condition_timed), has_psych_condition_timed := FALSE]

# merge num_visits and has_psych_condition_timed into patient_data_for_matching
patient_data_for_matching <- merge(patient_data_for_matching, patient_visits, by = "mrn_deid", all.x = TRUE)
patient_data_for_matching <- merge(patient_data_for_matching, patient_first_visits[, .(mrn_deid, has_psych_condition_timed)], by = "mrn_deid", all.x = TRUE)

#make sure has_psych_condition is always present and correctly factored
patient_data_for_matching[is.na(has_psych_condition_timed), has_psych_condition_timed := FALSE]
patient_data_for_matching[, has_psych_condition := factor(has_psych_condition_timed, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))]

# get all unique department names that matched the psych patterns (for reporting)
all_matched_dept_names <- unique(all_psych_encounters$appt_dept)
matched_dept_names_table <- data.table(matched_dept_name = all_matched_dept_names)

# Display in terminal
cat("\n=== MATCHED PSYCHIATRIC DEPARTMENT NAMES ===\n")
print(matched_dept_names_table)

# Save to file
matched_dept_names_output_path <- file.path(data_path, "matched_psych_department_names.csv")
fwrite(matched_dept_names_table, matched_dept_names_output_path)
cat(paste0("List of matched psychiatric department names saved to: ", matched_dept_names_output_path, "\n"))

# Apply final filtering to keep only patients with complete data for matching
initial_rows <- nrow(patient_data_for_matching)
initial_chronic_derm <- sum(patient_data_for_matching$is_chronic_derm)

# Filter to only patients with complete data AND adjust chronic derm status
complete_data_patients <- patient_data_for_matching[!is.na(age_at_encounter) & !is.na(sex) & 
                                                   !is.na(race_refined) & !is.na(ethnic_refined) & 
                                                   !is.na(race_ethnicity_combined) &
                                                   !is.na(fin_class) & !is.na(num_visits) & 
                                                   !is.na(has_psych_condition)]

# For chronic derm patients: only keep those with complete data
chronic_derm_final <- complete_data_patients[is_chronic_derm == TRUE, mrn_deid]
cat("Final chronic derm patients (complete covariates, PHQ guaranteed by File 01):", length(chronic_derm_final), "\n")

# Keep all control patients with complete data, only chronic derm patients with complete data
patient_data_for_matching <- complete_data_patients
patient_data_for_matching[, is_chronic_derm := mrn_deid %in% chronic_derm_final]

cat(paste0("Removed ", initial_rows - nrow(patient_data_for_matching), " rows due to missing covariate data.\n"))
cat(paste0("Final chronic derm patients in matching dataset: ", sum(patient_data_for_matching$is_chronic_derm), "\n"))

# make sure column names are clean 
current_names <- names(patient_data_for_matching)
for (col_name in c("age_at_encounter", "sex", "race_refined", "ethnic_refined", "fin_class")) {
  if (paste0(col_name, ".y") %in% current_names) {
    setnames(patient_data_for_matching, paste0(col_name, ".y"), col_name)
  }
}

# Sanity check: verify race/ethnicity distribution against manuscript Table 1
cat("\nRace/ethnicity by group (verify against manuscript Table 1):\n")
race_eth_check <- patient_data_for_matching[, .N, 
                                              by = .(race_ethnicity_combined, is_chronic_derm)][
                                              order(is_chronic_derm, race_ethnicity_combined)]
print(as.data.frame(race_eth_check))

# save data
output_prepared_data_rds <- file.path(data_path, "patient_data_for_matching.rds")
saveRDS(patient_data_for_matching, output_prepared_data_rds)

cat(paste("Prepared data for propensity score matching saved to:", output_prepared_data_rds, "\n"))

cat("Summary of prepared data:\n")
print(patient_data_for_matching[, .N, by = is_chronic_derm])
cat("VERIFICATION: Chronic derm patients in saved file:", sum(patient_data_for_matching$is_chronic_derm), "\n")
```
## Unmatched Cohort Comparison (Manuscript NL12 Paragraph)

```{r unmatched_comparison}
# Compare chronic derm cohort vs all eligible (unmatched) controls on
# demographic variables. These produce the P values reported in the manuscript
# Results paragraph: "more female (77% vs 62%; p < .001), Non-Hispanic Black
# (45% vs 33%; p < .001), younger (43 [17] vs 51 [19] years, p < .001),
# privately insured (66% vs 60%; p < .001)".

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("UNMATCHED COHORT DEMOGRAPHIC COMPARISON\n")
cat("========================================\n")
cat("Chronic derm:      ", sum(patient_data_for_matching$is_chronic_derm), "\n")
cat("Unmatched controls:", sum(!patient_data_for_matching$is_chronic_derm), "\n\n")

# ---- Sex ----
cat("--- Sex (Female vs Male; chi-square) ---\n")
sex_tab <- with(sex_data, table(is_chronic_derm, droplevels(factor(sex))))
print(sex_tab)
cat(sprintf("Pct female (chronic): %.1f%%   (%d/%d)\n",
            100 * sex_tab["TRUE", "Female"] / sum(sex_tab["TRUE", ]),
            sex_tab["TRUE", "Female"], sum(sex_tab["TRUE", ])))
cat(sprintf("Pct female (control): %.1f%%   (%d/%d)\n",
            100 * sex_tab["FALSE", "Female"] / sum(sex_tab["FALSE", ]),
            sex_tab["FALSE", "Female"], sum(sex_tab["FALSE", ])))
chi_sex <- chisq.test(sex_tab)
cat("Chi-square P:", format.pval(chi_sex$p.value, eps = 0.001), "\n\n")

# ---- Race/Ethnicity ----
cat("--- Race/Ethnicity (overall + NH Black 2x2) ---\n")
race_tab <- with(patient_data_for_matching,
                 table(is_chronic_derm, race_ethnicity_combined))
print(race_tab)
race_pct_chronic <- 100 * race_tab["TRUE", ] / sum(race_tab["TRUE", ])
race_pct_control <- 100 * race_tab["FALSE", ] / sum(race_tab["FALSE", ])
cat("\nPct by race (chronic / control):\n")
for (lvl in colnames(race_tab)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s %5.1f%% / %5.1f%%\n",
              lvl, race_pct_chronic[lvl], race_pct_control[lvl]))
}
chi_race <- chisq.test(race_tab)
cat(sprintf("\nChi-square P (overall, %d df): %s\n",
            chi_race$parameter, format.pval(chi_race$p.value, eps = 0.001)))

# 2x2 specifically for NH Black vs not (manuscript reports this single comparison)
nhb_tab <- with(patient_data_for_matching,
                table(is_chronic_derm,
                      race_ethnicity_combined == "Non-Hispanic Black"))
colnames(nhb_tab) <- c("Other", "NH_Black")
chi_nhb <- chisq.test(nhb_tab)
cat(sprintf("Chi-square P (NH Black vs other): %s\n",
            format.pval(chi_nhb$p.value, eps = 0.001)))
cat(sprintf("Pct NH Black (chronic): %.1f%%   Pct NH Black (control): %.1f%%\n\n",
            100 * nhb_tab["TRUE", "NH_Black"] / sum(nhb_tab["TRUE", ]),
            100 * nhb_tab["FALSE", "NH_Black"] / sum(nhb_tab["FALSE", ])))

# ---- Insurance (Private Payors vs not) ----
cat("--- Insurance (Private Payors 2x2) ---\n")
priv_tab <- with(patient_data_for_matching,
                 table(is_chronic_derm,
                       fin_class == "Private Payors"))
colnames(priv_tab) <- c("Other", "Private")
print(priv_tab)
cat(sprintf("Pct private (chronic): %.1f%%   (%d/%d)\n",
            100 * priv_tab["TRUE", "Private"] / sum(priv_tab["TRUE", ]),
            priv_tab["TRUE", "Private"], sum(priv_tab["TRUE", ])))
cat(sprintf("Pct private (control): %.1f%%   (%d/%d)\n",
            100 * priv_tab["FALSE", "Private"] / sum(priv_tab["FALSE", ]),
            priv_tab["FALSE", "Private"], sum(priv_tab["FALSE", ])))
chi_priv <- chisq.test(priv_tab)
cat("Chi-square P:", format.pval(chi_priv$p.value, eps = 0.001), "\n\n")

# ---- Age (Welch t-test) ----
cat("--- Age (Welch t-test) ---\n")
age_chronic <- patient_data_for_matching[is_chronic_derm == TRUE, age_at_encounter]
age_control <- patient_data_for_matching[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, age_at_encounter]
cat(sprintf("Chronic mean age: %.1f (SD %.1f), median %.0f, n=%d\n",
            mean(age_chronic, na.rm = TRUE), sd(age_chronic, na.rm = TRUE),
            median(age_chronic, na.rm = TRUE), sum(!is.na(age_chronic))))
cat(sprintf("Control mean age: %.1f (SD %.1f), median %.0f, n=%d\n",
            mean(age_control, na.rm = TRUE), sd(age_control, na.rm = TRUE),
            median(age_control, na.rm = TRUE), sum(!is.na(age_control))))
t_age <- t.test(age_at_encounter ~ is_chronic_derm,
                data = patient_data_for_matching)
cat("Welch t-test P:", format.pval(t_age$p.value, eps = 0.001), "\n\n")

# ---- Save summary CSV ----
unmatched_summary <- data.table(
  Variable = c("Female (% of total)",
               "Non-Hispanic Black (% of total)",
               "Private Payors (% of total)",
               "Age (mean, SD)"),
  Pct_or_Mean_Chronic = c(
    sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)",
            100 * sex_tab["TRUE", "Female"] / sum(sex_tab["TRUE", ]),
            sex_tab["TRUE", "Female"], sum(sex_tab["TRUE", ])),
    sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)",
            100 * nhb_tab["TRUE", "NH_Black"] / sum(nhb_tab["TRUE", ]),
            nhb_tab["TRUE", "NH_Black"], sum(nhb_tab["TRUE", ])),
    sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)",
            100 * priv_tab["TRUE", "Private"] / sum(priv_tab["TRUE", ]),
            priv_tab["TRUE", "Private"], sum(priv_tab["TRUE", ])),
    sprintf("%.1f (SD %.1f)", mean(age_chronic, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd(age_chronic, na.rm = TRUE))
  ),
  Pct_or_Mean_Control = c(
    sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)",
            100 * sex_tab["FALSE", "Female"] / sum(sex_tab["FALSE", ]),
            sex_tab["FALSE", "Female"], sum(sex_tab["FALSE", ])),
    sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)",
            100 * nhb_tab["FALSE", "NH_Black"] / sum(nhb_tab["FALSE", ]),
            nhb_tab["FALSE", "NH_Black"], sum(nhb_tab["FALSE", ])),
    sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)",
            100 * priv_tab["FALSE", "Private"] / sum(priv_tab["FALSE", ]),
            priv_tab["FALSE", "Private"], sum(priv_tab["FALSE", ])),
    sprintf("%.1f (SD %.1f)", mean(age_control, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd(age_control, na.rm = TRUE))
  ),
  Test = c("Chi-square", "Chi-square (NH Black vs other)",
           "Chi-square (Private vs other)", "Welch t-test"),
  P_Value = c(format.pval(chi_sex$p.value, eps = 0.001),
              format.pval(chi_nhb$p.value, eps = 0.001),
              format.pval(chi_priv$p.value, eps = 0.001),
              format.pval(t_age$p.value, eps = 0.001))
)

# Build csv_dir if it doesn't exist (File 02 doesn't currently use one)
csv_dir <- file.path("C:/Users/dkucirek/Documents/Derm-SRP", "csv")
if (!dir.exists(csv_dir)) dir.create(csv_dir, recursive = TRUE)

fwrite(unmatched_summary, file.path(csv_dir, "Unmatched_Comparison.csv"))
cat("Saved:", file.path(csv_dir, "Unmatched_Comparison.csv"), "\n")
print(unmatched_summary)
```


### Analyze Specific Chronic Derm ICD Codes

```{r}
icd_codes_of_interest <- c(
  "L66",   # Cicatricial alopecia
  "L70",   # Acne
  "L20",   # Atopic dermatitis
  "L73.2", # Hidradenitis suppurativa
  "L71",   # Rosacea
  "L80",   # Vitiligo
  "L63",   # Alopecia areata
  "L40",   # Psoriasis
  "L93",   # Lupus erythematosus
  "M32.8",
  "M32.9", # Systemic lupus erythematosus, unspecified
  "M32.1"  # Systemic lupus erythematosus, other
)

pattern <- paste(icd_codes_of_interest, collapse = "|")

filtered_encounters <- result_wide[str_detect(icd10_dx, pattern)]

# summarize, show results 
if (nrow(filtered_encounters) > 0) {
  filtered_encounters[, icd_category := str_extract(icd10_dx, paste(icd_codes_of_interest, collapse = "|"))]

  icd_counts <- filtered_encounters[, .N, by = icd_category][order(-N)]

  results_list <- filtered_encounters[, .(
    mrn_deid,
    icd_category,
    icd10_dx,
    icd_diagnosis,
    appt_dept
  )]

  # Display in terminal
  cat("\n=== SPECIFIC ICD ENCOUNTERS ===\n")
  print(results_list)
  
  #save to CSV
  output_file <- "specific_icd_encounters.csv"
  fwrite(results_list, file.path(data_path, output_file))
}

# Save PHQ severity summary for later use
cat("Saving PHQ severity summary data...\n")

# Display in terminal
cat("\n=== CHRONIC DERM PHQ SEVERITY SUMMARY ===\n")
print(chronic_derm_phq_summary)

fwrite(chronic_derm_phq_summary, file.path(data_path, "chronic_derm_phq_severity_summary.csv"))

library(data.table)
pd <- readRDS("Z:/Kucirek/patient_data_for_matching.rds")
setDT(pd)
print(as.data.frame(pd[, .N, by = .(race_ethnicity_combined, is_chronic_derm)][
  order(is_chronic_derm, race_ethnicity_combined)]))

cat("\n=== TABLE 1 DEMOGRAPHICS (FULL BREAKDOWN) ===\n")

cat("\nInsurance by group:\n")
print(patient_data_for_matching[, .N, by = .(fin_class, is_chronic_derm)][
  order(is_chronic_derm, fin_class)])

cat("\nSex by group (including unknown):\n")
print(patient_data_for_matching[, .N, by = .(sex, is_chronic_derm)][
  order(is_chronic_derm, sex)])

cat("\nPrior psych care by group:\n")
print(patient_data_for_matching[, .N, by = .(has_psych_condition, is_chronic_derm)][
  order(is_chronic_derm, has_psych_condition)])

cat("\nAge by group (mean, SD, median, n):\n")
print(patient_data_for_matching[, .(
  mean_age = round(mean(age_at_encounter, na.rm=TRUE), 1),
  sd_age = round(sd(age_at_encounter, na.rm=TRUE), 1),
  median_age = median(age_at_encounter, na.rm=TRUE),
  n = .N
), by = is_chronic_derm])
```
